# ProposalCraft

> MCP server that drafts client proposals in your voice from a brief. Paste a client brief, get a ready-to-send proposal in ~30 seconds.

ProposalCraft is a local stdio MCP server for Claude Desktop. It uses your saved winning proposals as voice and structure reference ‚Äî not generic templates ‚Äî so each draft sounds like you.

## Features

- 29 tools covering the full proposal workflow
- Local-only: no API key, no account, no data sent anywhere
- Freemium: 5 free drafts/month, Pro at $19/mo for unlimited
- Install: `npx -y github:jabbawocky/proposalcraft`

## Tools

- `discovery_call_prep` ‚Äî prepares a discovery call guide (agenda, must-confirm items, questions, tone notes, red flags) from a brief
- `project_kickoff_email` ‚Äî writes a professional kickoff email to send after winning a project
- `change_order` ‚Äî formal change order document when client requests out-of-scope work
- `testimonial_request` ‚Äî short personal email asking client for a testimonial after delivery
- `rate_increase_email` ‚Äî email telling an existing client rates are increasing, direct and warm, no apology
- `invoice_reminder` ‚Äî overdue invoice reminder with escalating tone for reminder #1, #2, or #3
- `cold_pitch` ‚Äî cold outbound pitch email to a target company, specific hook, under 120 words, one ask
- `rejection_response` ‚Äî gracious reply when a client picks someone else, keeps door open, under 80 words
- `budget_proposal` ‚Äî revised proposal cutting scope not rate when client says quote is too high (counts against free limit)
- `project_status_update` ‚Äî weekly/biweekly status update email: completed, next steps, blockers, timeline
- `nda_template` ‚Äî plain-English NDA, one-way or mutual, configurable duration and governing law jurisdiction
- `contract_template` ‚Äî plain-English Freelance Services Agreement: services, payment, IP transfer, revisions, termination, liability cap
- `referral_request` ‚Äî short warm email asking a happy client to refer you to new clients, under 120 words, one clear ask
- `meeting_recap_email` ‚Äî post-meeting recap: what was discussed, decisions confirmed, next steps; adapts to discovery/kickoff/check-in/review meeting types
- `project_closure_email` ‚Äî final delivery email: confirms deliverables, client handover actions, support period, future work hook
- `availability_announcement` ‚Äî warm email to a past client announcing capacity is opening up, re-activates relationship without cold-pitching, under 120 words
- `proposal_to_email` ‚Äî converts a full proposal into a ‚â§150-word pitch email with subject line
- `analyze_brief` ‚Äî surfaces budget signals, red flags, scope risks before you quote
- `draft_proposal` ‚Äî generates a proposal from a brief using your saved examples (counts against free limit)
- `retainer_proposal` ‚Äî drafts a monthly retainer proposal with scope, exclusions, rollover policy, and 30-day termination clause (counts against free limit)
- `improve_proposal` ‚Äî reviews a draft and returns specific rewrites for weak sections
- `scope_of_work` ‚Äî converts an accepted proposal into a formal SOW
- `client_followup` ‚Äî writes a follow-up for unanswered proposals
- `save_proposal` / `list_proposals` / `get_proposal` / `delete_proposal` ‚Äî library management
- `load_examples` ‚Äî bootstraps 12 bundled industry templates
- `usage_status` ‚Äî reports remaining free drafts

## Install (Claude Desktop)

Add to `~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json`:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "proposalcraft": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "github:jabbawocky/proposalcraft"]
    }
  }
}
```
